recentPapers.title: Deep Learning and Artificial Intelligence: Project Collaboration across Classes
recentPapers.abstract: Deep Learning can be considered as a subset of AI, and DL is heavily studied and used in AI. This paper describes project collaboration across classes at Cal Poly.

recentPapers.title: Assessment of ethics and social justice aspects in data science and artificial intelligence
recentPapers.abstract: This document describes methods for assessing ethics and social justice aspects in data science and AI education at Cal Poly, including predictive machine learning models.

recentPapers.title: The Search Intelligence Process Using Artificial Intelligence
recentPapers.abstract: Deep learning is a class of machine learning algorithms that enables search intelligence processes. This work is conducted at Cal Poly Computer Science and Software Engineering Department.

recentPapers.title: Creating a probabilistic graph for WordNet using markov logic network
recentPapers.abstract: The paper shows how to create a probabilistic graph for WordNet. A node is created for every word and phrase in WordNet. An edge between two nodes is labeled with the probability of co-occurrence.

recentPapers.title: Introducing Mixed Tables
recentPapers.abstract: Two approaches for extending relational database tables to allow storing uncertain and incomplete information have been proposed in the past.

recentPapers.title: Automating deep-sea video annotation using machine learning
recentPapers.abstract: Fourteen students and two faculties at California Polytechnic State University have worked on the project to develop a software tool for automating deep-sea video annotation.
